prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A full-body character design of Shen Yuubai, a young Chinese male in his mid-twenties, standing centered against a pure white background. Cinematic atmosphere, hyper-realistic style with natural lighting reminiscent of golden-hour city glow.

Extremely handsome face with strikingly delicate features, sharp jawline, high cheekbones, and a sculpted bone structure that catches light beautifully. Clear, luminous skin with a slightly pale undertone suggesting long nights of creative work. Deep-set, intelligent dark brown eyes with a pensive, melancholic gaze — eyes that seem to observe everything while revealing little. Straight, well-defined nose, naturally full lips slightly pressed together in a quiet, contemplative expression. Thick, dark black hair, slightly tousled and grown out to medium length, with soft waves falling across his forehead and brushing past his ears, giving an effortlessly artistic look. Faint dark circles beneath his eyes hint at chronic sleep deprivation, adding a layer of lived-in realism to his otherwise striking beauty. Attractive, delicate features, clear skin, exceptionally good-looking, handsome, beautiful bone structure, magnetic quiet charisma.

He wears a slightly oversized vintage dark navy linen shirt, top button undone, sleeves loosely rolled to the forearms, layered over a faded black cotton crew-neck tee. Slim-fit washed charcoal trousers with a relaxed straight cut, slightly wrinkled at the knees. Worn-in white canvas sneakers with visible scuff marks. A simple black digital watch on his left wrist. A thin braided leather cord bracelet on the right. A small silver ring on his left index finger. The clothing palette is muted — navy, charcoal, black, off-white — reflecting understated urban realism and the aesthetic sensibility of an independent filmmaker who cares about visual composition even in how he dresses, yet never appears to try too hard.

His posture is relaxed but carries a subtle tension in the shoulders, suggesting someone who appears calm on the surface but is perpetually processing internal conflict. Lean, average build — not athletic, not frail — the body of someone who forgets meals while editing footage. His overall silhouette is slender and slightly angular.

The entire image conveys the aura of a young auteur filmmaker navigating the liminal space between artistic ambition and emotional vulnerability, set against the cultural backdrop of a transitioning Chinese coastal city. Cinematic realism, film-still quality, shallow depth-of-field feel even on white background, no text, no symbols, no words, no watermarks., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: 电影氛围，真实感强烈
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
